name: pwSh
description: Initialize or use the in-memory PowerShell runner. Init loads the fixed Tools/Any/any/rdm.dll tool artifact.

beacon_hash.description: Full beacon hash identifying the session that should execute the command.

listener_hash.description: Full listener hash for the target beacon session.

command_or_script.description: PowerShell command text for run, or script artifact name/id for import or script.
